title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: March 7, 2024
summary: March 7, 2024: The sea ice has essentially remained static this week, with essentially no change at a very tiny growth rate of 0.01% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 0.27%), from the level on 02/29/2024 of 14.783 M km 2 to 14.784 M km 2 for this week. So, perhaps we are right on the chang...

title: Varsity Vikings flatten visiting Panthers; Lady Vikings secure third win of the season
summary: Petersburg High School’s basketball teams hosted Craig last week for the Vikings’ senior weekend. The Varsity Vikings defeated the Panthers both nights, securing a second seed in the ongoing 2A regional tournament. The Vikings won Friday’s game 57-to-46.
